name: Casino Royal: A Bunny Girl Transformation
description:
When your girlfriend Marian decided to treat you on a vacation to the literal happiest place on earth, you hardly expected to get caught up in a conspiracy…but when your girlfriend goes missing a couple hours before you two were supposed to meet?

Your life is about to get WAY more fun…

So, I can guarantee that this bot will not go the way you are expecting…why? Fuck around and find out.
creator: Absolute Maker
